testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Button Component should have no accessibility violations in default state
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Button Component should have no accessibility violations in default state

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Button Component should have no violations when disabled
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Button Component should have no violations when disabled

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Button Component should have no violations when loading
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Button Component should have no violations when loading

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Alert Component should have no accessibility violations
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Alert Component should have no accessibility violations

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Alert Component should have proper ARIA roles for different variants
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Alert Component should have proper ARIA roles for different variants

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Checkbox Component should have no accessibility violations
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Checkbox Component should have no accessibility violations

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Card Component should have no accessibility violations
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Card Component should have no accessibility violations

testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Divider Component should have no accessibility violations

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Keyboard Navigation interactive elements should be keyboard accessible
testcase.name: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Keyboard Navigation interactive elements should be keyboard accessible

testcase.classname: Design System Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) Screen Reader Compatibility should have proper ARIA labels and roles
